title: Setteal's Simple CIT
description: Makes every item in Minecraft placeable and nonintrusive to vanilla gameplay.
body:
Hello folks!

 

You WILL need Optifine or CIT Resewn to make this resource pack work!

 

This resource pack was made to be as minimally obtrusive as possible to vanilla gameplay. It was originally a mod to make every item in Minecraft placeable but was converted to a CIT pack for ease of access. It includes every item, except for potions, spawn eggs, and the spyglass. (Due to not being able to use NBT data for the CIT model) You will want to use Invisible Item Frames! Weapons, Tools, and Armor HAVE BEEN ADDED! Woo!

 

Installation and Usage:

 

Java Edition:

You will need either Optifine or CIT Resewn (If you're using Fabric, Sodium, etc.)

 

Optifine:

https://optifine.net/downloads

In Optifine's settings, go to video settings, quality, and enable custom items.

 

CIT Resewn:

https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn

 

Bedrock Edition:

You won't need any additional mods, it's just a resource pack (no default item art, just the models)

 

Naming Conventions:

I wanted to make this as easy as possible to use.

 

Just pop any item into the anvil, and type "v" in front of any vanilla item.

 

Such as "vcookie" and viola!

  

Recommendations:

If you get annoyed out of your mind by seeing name tags everywhere, use this mod with CIT Resewn!

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/no-name-tags

 

Made by the fabulous SpaceWalkerRS!

 

 

I hope you enjoy it! Thank you for reading!
